context: This is the test fixture project. It demonstrates a Nuxt app with i18n support, featuring a root layer with shared translations and an app-admin layer with admin-specific translations.

layerRules.description: Shared translations used across all apps. Keys like common.actions.*, common.messages.*, common.navigation.*
layerRules.when: The key is generic enough to be used in multiple apps (e.g., 'Save', 'Cancel', 'Loading...')

layerRules.description: Admin dashboard translations. Keys like admin.*, pages.*, components.* specific to the admin panel.
layerRules.when: The key is only relevant to admin functionality

glossary.Ressource: Resource (a bookable entity like a room, desk, or person)

translationPrompt: You are translating for a SaaS booking platform. Use professional but approachable tone. Preserve all {placeholders}. Keep translations concise.

localeNotes.de-DE: German. Primary language of the platform.
